message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array of 3 objects, each with "question" field indicating the question type: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback and boolean complies.

We must evaluate the given final section of thesis introduction. The questions: 1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? 2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section. 3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text?

We need to answer each. The text is a paragraph describing the problem statement and context. It does not list chapters. So question 1: No. Provide feedback: text doesn't list sections. Complies false.

Question 2: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No, because no sections described. So false.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text does not provide structure; it just describes problem. So false.

Thus all three false. Provide feedback accordingly. Ensure JSON array with objects in order. Provide exactly 3 objects. Use correct boolean values. Provide no extra text.
